title: narcissus × abilioi nothosubsp. turgaliensis
intro: Narcissus × abilioi nothosubsp. turgaliensis is a hybrid plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family, derived from the cross between Narcissus abilioi and a species of the Narcissus genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Narcissus × abilioi nothosubsp. turgaliensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its possible role in reducing fever and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
